title: Audit LOG_WRN vs LOG_DBG for cosmetic failures
description:
Downgrade LOG_WRN to LOG_DBG for non-actionable cosmetic issues.

Candidates:
  LOG_WRN("Failed to set thread name: %d");  // cosmetic, no impact
  LOG_INF("tick");                           // noise, remove or LOG_DBG

Criteria:
- LOG_WRN: operator should investigate or take action
- LOG_DBG: developer debugging info only
close_reason: Fixed: Downgraded thread name failure LOG_WRN to LOG_DBG (cosmetic, non-actionable)
